name: DJV
desc: Free EXR file viewer. DJV is a free, open-source high bit-depth image sequence player built for professional film, VFX & animation workflows. Use it for frame-…
descFull: Free EXR file viewer. DJV is a free, open-source high bit-depth image sequence player built for professional film, VFX & animation workflows. Use it for frame-accurate dailies, shot review, and A/B comparisons. Available for Linux, macOS, and Windows.
